JUP.why_held: Jupiter ecosystem exposure with verified protocol utility, governance, potential Active Staking Rewards, and participation in Jupiter product growth.
JUP.target_plan: Review around 0.24 USD; reassess thesis and consider partial USDC profit-taking rather than round-tripping gains.
JUP.invalidation: Review below 0.17 USD or after material tokenomics, security, governance, or ecosystem deterioration.
JUP.yield_plan: Keep liquid until the exact governance/Earn path is verified; do not lock the full balance.
JUP.review_note: CoinGecko 2026-07-11 16:44 UTC: JUP $0.207932, 24h +3.51%, 7d -12.33%, 30d +34.55%, mcap $690.42M, vol $24.19M. Circulating 3,320,312,968 / Total 6,862,434,710.79 / Max 10B. ATH $2.00 (2024-01-31). Jupiter Goes Green DAO passed: net emissions ~0; last team unlock 2026-01-27; Mercurial final 77.97M JUP 2026-02-25; Community (300M) + Strategic (1,332.7M) TBD — primary residual supply overhang. ASR Q2 2026 (Apr-Jun, 50M JUP pool) claim period OPEN through Oct 8 2026; eligibility requires ≥50 JUP avg stake + DAO vote participation — wallet holds 53.20 JUP but did not vote, so NOT eligible for Q2 claim. Q3 2026 ASR not yet announced. Governance paused since 2025-07; no re-initiation verified this cycle. Triggers: review ~$0.24 (current ~$0.032 below target); review/invalidation below ~$0.17.

cbBTC.why_held: BTC diversification through a verified Solana-wrapped BTC asset with deep reported liquidity and exposure to BTC price appreciation.
cbBTC.target_plan: Review near 70000 USD; consider partial USDC profit-taking if liquidity and wrapped-asset conditions remain sound.
cbBTC.invalidation: Review below 56000 USD or on custody, bridge, reserve, redemption, or wrapped-asset concerns.
cbBTC.yield_plan: No yield product chosen yet; compare lending or Earn only after reserve and withdrawal checks.

JupSOL.why_held: Liquid SOL staking exposure intended to earn staking/MEV-related yield while remaining tradable or usable in DeFi.
JupSOL.target_plan: Monitor JupSOL/SOL exchange-rate growth, validator health, liquidity, and reward accrual; rebalance if liquidity or validator risk changes.
JupSOL.invalidation: Review on depeg, validator/security issue, major liquidity loss, or inability to trade/redeem.
JupSOL.yield_plan: Liquid staking through JupSOL; current APY sourced from Solana Compass 5.71% (median last 10 epochs methodology), rewards accrue through JupSOL/SOL exchange-rate growth; not inferred from a single snapshot.
JupSOL.invalidator_note: Depeg check 2026-07-11T16:44Z (slot 432,259,524): 0.025072774 JupSOL = 0.0300024 SOL via Jupiter Quote (AlphaQ route, 0.00003% impact); mark ratio 93.21/77.75 = 1.19869. Quote-vs-mark drift 0.17% (within ±0.5% tolerance). Sanctum Infinity 0-impact swaps + sanctum-multi stake-pool program intact. Trigger review on validator count decline, sanctum-multi deprecation, or >1% depeg.
JupSOL.review_note: Read-only diligence 2026-07-11T18:34:02.778659+00:00: wallet holds 0.025072774 JupSOL, value $2.3440 (363.3 bps NAV). APY 5.71% from Solana Compass current APY/headline methodology (not a single exchange-rate snapshot) => est $0.1338/yr (20.7 bps NAV/yr). Wallet quote 0.030002641 SOL for 0.025072774 JupSOL = ratio 1.196622; Compass pool token value 1.198 SOL, total staked 5,242,710.0 SOL, active validators 4, pool token supply 4,377,825.31. Official docs: rewards are staking + 100% MEV kickbacks + 100% priority fees; Jupiter validator 0% commission; Sanctum epoch fee 5% on base staking rewards; instant swap or delayed unstake (~2 days) with 0.1% withdrawal fee if unwrapping/withdrawal path. Risk: LST depeg/liquidity, validator concentration/performance, Sanctum/SPL stake-pool program/multisig/management authority, SOL volatility. No transaction. Evidence: evidence/jupiter-yield-diligence-2026-07-11T18-34-02-778659+00-00.json, evidence/jupiter-yield-diligence-2026-07-11T18-34-02-778659+00-00.md.

JL-USDC.why_held: Stablecoin lending exposure intended to earn variable borrower interest while preserving USDC-denominated accounting.
JL-USDC.target_plan: Monitor supply APY, utilization, available withdrawal liquidity, and net yield after fees; withdraw or rebalance if economics deteriorate.
JL-USDC.invalidation: Review on smart-contract exploit, oracle issue, withdrawal restriction, stablecoin depeg, or severe liquidity decline.
JL-USDC.yield_plan: Variable Jupiter Lend Earn supply; current totalRate 4.48% = supply 3.75% + rewards 0.73%; withdrawals subject to dynamic liquidity limits.

JLP_watchlist.why_considered: Jupiter Perps liquidity-provider exposure with a documented share of trading fees.
JLP_watchlist.target_plan: Compare net fee yield, pool composition, trader PnL, mint/redeem fees, liquidity, and downside before purchase.
JLP_watchlist.invalidation: Do not enter if pool risk, redemption mechanics, or net yield are unclear.
JLP_watchlist.yield_plan: Potential perps fee accrual, not guaranteed yield.
JLP_watchlist.review_note: CoinGecko 2026-07-11 16:44 UTC: JLP $3.66, 24h +0.20%, 7d -1.56%, 30d +10.78% (recovery), mcap $825.57M, vol $1.31M, circ/total supply 225.665M (no inflation). JupUSD added as 6th custody asset on 2026-06-30 (per @JupiterExchange / CryptoBriefing / Solana Compass). Jupiter Quote 1-unit test confirms $3.66 at 0.00025% impact via Whirlpool; 1k-unit test $3.63M at 0.00758% impact via 4-hop Perps-dominant route. JupUSD reserves ~90% in USDtb (Ethena, BlackRock BUIDL-token-backed) → indirect exposure to RWA / tokenized-Treasury mechanics. Pool APY methodology = 75% of Perps fees (open/close/borrow/price-impact/swap), hourly re-deposit; excludes asset appreciation and trader PnL. Historical headline 8-20% APY (Bankless/CMC); up to 43% via JLP Loan (third-party X). No entry: pool composition + JupUSD/BlackRock-BUIDL custody chain not fully reconciled; trader PnL data not pulled this cycle.
